message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Made in Heaven: Complete Progression Guide 2026",
  description: "Master the ultimate speed Stand in Bizarre Lineage. Learn how to get Made in Heaven, complete Pucci's quest, and optimize your PvP build for 2026.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e1e2e/fff?text=Made+in+Heaven+Progression",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Bizarre lineage made in heaven**: The ultimate S-Tier speed Stand evolved from C-Moon.
- **Core Requirements**: Prestige 1, White Snake Stand, 7 Dio's Bones, and 1 Dio's Diary.
- **Quest NPC**: Pucci is located inside the Cultist Castle at Bus Stop 18.
- **The Grind**: Requires SSS rank solo raids against Jotaro, Dio, and Kira.
- **Best Build**: Pair with Kendo fighting style and Vampire sub-ability for peak PvP.
</Callout>

In the fast-paced world of Roblox's latest JoJo-inspired hit, achieving the pinnacle of speed is the ultimate goal for many players. The **bizarre lineage made in heaven** Stand represents the final evolution of the White Snake line, offering unparalleled mobility and devastating combo potential that can dominate any server. Obtaining this Stand is not a simple task; it requires a deep commitment to grinding high-level raids, managing rare resources, and navigating a complex multi-stage questline delivered by the iconic NPC, Pucci.

Whether you are a newcomer just reaching Prestige 1 or a veteran looking to optimize your current setup, understanding the nuances of the "Journey to Heaven" is essential. This guide provides a comprehensive roadmap for 2026, detailing every requirement, raid strategy, and move set optimization needed to master the world's fastest Stand. From the initial White Snake pull to the final "Acceleration" awakening, we have documented the most efficient path to help you transcend the limits of time and space in Bizarre Lineage.

<Section icon={Shield} title="Initial Requirements and Prerequisites">

Before you can even begin the quest for **bizarre lineage made in heaven**, your character must meet specific progression milestones. Attempting to talk to Pucci without these requirements will result in a wasted trip to the Cultist Castle.

**Essential Prerequisites:**
- **Prestige 1**: Reach the maximum level cap and pay 10,000 Cash to the Arch Mage NPC at the Hospital (near Bus Stop 10).
- **White Snake Stand**: You must have White Snake equipped to initiate the questline. This is best obtained using Lucky Arrows from Legendary Chests.
- **Resource Stockpile**: It is highly recommended to farm your items before starting the later quest stages to avoid mid-grind delays.

| Item Name | Quantity Required | Primary Source | Usage |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Dio's Bone** | 7 | Chests / Raid Rewards / Rah Store | Journey to Heaven Part 2 |
| **Dio's Diary** | 1 | Dio Raid Drop / Legendary Chests | Final Evolution Trigger |
| **Green Baby** | 1 | Quest Reward (Part 1) | Evolves White Snake to C-Moon |
| **Cash** | 10,000+ | Quests / World Events | Prestige and Item Purchases |

<Callout type="warning" title="Inventory Management Warning">
Be extremely careful when managing your Stands. There have been reports of players accidentally deleting their C-Moon or White Snake during the grind. Always double-check your inventory before resetting or using new Arrows, as losing a quest-active Stand will reset your progress.
</Callout>

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="White Snake Strategy">
    - **Revolver Skill**: Excellent for long-range PVE farming.
    - **Raid Efficiency**: Many players prefer keeping White Snake until the final SSS raids are finished.
  </Card>
  <Card title="C-Moon Transition">
    - **Melee Focus**: Higher raw damage but shorter range.
    - **Evolution Requirement**: You must be using C-Moon to finalize the Made in Heaven quest.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="The Journey to Heaven Questline">

The path to obtaining **bizarre lineage made in heaven** is divided into four distinct parts, collectively known as the "Journey to Heaven." You must locate Pucci at Bus Stop 18. Head through the gate to the Cultist Castle, enter the main building, and find him in the room on the left.

**Video Highlights:**
- Detailed walkthrough of the Pucci NPC location at Bus Stop 18.
- Visual guide for the Okuyasu boss fight and early raid requirements.
- Step-by-step demonstration of the Green Baby evolution process.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="nEH7JnqqXlo" title="Bizarre Lineage Made In Heaven Progression Guide" />

<Callout type="tip" title="Pro Tip: Team Raids">
Although some quest descriptions mention "Solo," current game mechanics in 2026 allow you to complete these raids with a team. Bringing friends significantly lowers the difficulty of achieving S and SSS ranks, especially for the Kira raid.
</Callout>

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="The First Trial">
    Talk to Pucci with White Snake equipped. Your first task is to defeat the Okuyasu boss (beginner level) and complete the initial raid set (Jotaro, Dio, Kira) with at least an S rank. This rewards you with the **Green Baby**. Use it to evolve into C-Moon.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="The Bone Collection">
    Return to Pucci. You must now submit **7 Dio's Bones**. While these can be bought at the Rah Store for 25k each, it is much more cost-effective to farm them through world event chests.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="The SSS Rank Grind">
    This is the hardest stage. You must defeat 467 Prison Escapees and complete three world events. Additionally, you must clear the Jotaro, Dio, and Kira raids with an **SSS rank** three times each. 
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Attaining Heaven">
    Once the SSS raids are complete, bring **1 Dio's Diary** to Pucci. He will ask if you are prepared to attain heaven. Confirming this will trigger the evolution of your C-Moon into Made in Heaven.
  </Step>
</Steps>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Made in Heaven Move Set and Mechanics">

Once you have secured the **bizarre lineage made in heaven** Stand, you unlock a move set dominated by speed, teleports, and time manipulation. Most moves scale off **Destructive Power** (Physical), though some utility skills utilize Destructive Energy.

| Key | Move Name | Scaling | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **E** | Speed Slash / Barrage | Physical | Rapid strikes that can be followed up with M1s. |
| **R** | Infinite Pursuit | Physical | A dash attack; press again on hit to teleport and strike. |
| **Z** | Heaven's Wrath | Physical | Fast dash that resets cooldown if it successfully lands. |
| **X** | Knife Massacre | Physical | Throws knives; second press teleports you for a slam. |
| **C** | Light Speed | Energy | A block-breaking teleport that circles the enemy. |
| **V** | Acceleration | Utility | Massive speed boost; accelerates the world's day/night cycle. |
| **H** | Awakening | Special | Long cinematic that grants temporary massive buffs. |

<Callout type="success" title="Combat Advantage">
The Z move (Heaven's Wrath) is your bread and butter. Because the cooldown resets upon hitting an enemy, high-skill players can chain this with M1s to keep opponents in a perpetual state of hit-stun.
</Callout>

**Video Highlights:**
- Showcase of the "Infinite Pursuit" combo extensions.
- Breakdown of the "Acceleration" speed buff and its impact on mobility.
- Boss testing against Jotaro Kujo to demonstrate damage output.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="q4Cq3tBhvic" title="Made in Heaven Build & Combat Showcase" />

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Best Builds and Matchups">

To maximize the potential of **bizarre lineage made in heaven**, you must pair it with the right fighting style and sub-abilities. In the current 2026 meta, mobility and sustain are favored over raw glass-cannon builds.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="PvP Build: The Speedster">
    - **Style**: Kendo
    - **Sub-Ability**: Vampire
    - **Focus**: Life steal on every hit to offset the Stand's lower health.
  </Card>
  <Card title="PvE Build: Raid Master">
    - **Style**: Boxing
    - **Sub-Ability**: Cyborg
    - **Focus**: Defense and health regen for soloing SSS raids.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Hybrid Build: Balanced">
    - **Style**: Karate
    - **Sub-Ability**: Ripple
    - **Focus**: High damage output with decent stamina management.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="info" title="Matchup Knowledge">
Made in Heaven naturally counters **King Crimson** due to its superior speed and ability to outrun "Time Erase." However, it struggles against **Star Platinum: The World** because "Time Stop" completely negates your speed advantage.
</Callout>

| Target Stand | Difficulty | Strategy |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **King Crimson** | Easy | Use V (Acceleration) to stay out of range and poke with X. |
| **Killer Queen** | Medium | Dodge the bombs; use C (Light Speed) to close gaps instantly. |
| **Star Platinum** | Hard | Bait out the Time Stop before committing to an Infinite Pursuit combo. |
| **The World** | Hard | Maintain distance with knives; only engage when their TS is on cooldown. |

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Mastery Checklist">

Use this checklist to track your progress toward becoming a top-tier Made in Heaven user. Mastery requires more than just unlocking the Stand; it requires fine-tuning your build and learning precise timings.

<Checklist
  id="mih-mastery"
  title="Made in Heaven Completion Goals:"
  items={[
    "Reach Max Mastery level for all Stand moves",
    "Obtain the 'Felicity Design Comfort' achievement/title",
    "Purchase Life Steal passives from the Dio Raid shop",
    "Successfully solo an SSS Rank Kira Raid",
    "Equip the Kendo fighting style for optimal combos"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="warning" title="Cooldown Management">
While Acceleration (V) makes you incredibly fast, it consumes a significant amount of power. Do not activate it at the start of a fight; save it for when you need to escape a combo or finish a fleeing opponent.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "How do I get the Dio's Diary for bizarre lineage made in heaven?",
    answer: "Dio's Diary is a rare drop from the Dio Raid (located at the Graveyard near Bus Stop 18) or can be found in Legendary Chests obtained through world events."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I skip C-Moon and go straight to Made in Heaven?",
    answer: "No. The questline is linear. You must evolve White Snake into C-Moon using the Green Baby before Pucci will allow you to progress toward Made in Heaven."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the best location to farm the 467 Prison Escapees?",
    answer: "The best farming spot is near Bus Stop 1. There is a prime location where multiple Prison Escapees spawn close together, allowing for efficient AOE farming."
  },
  {
    question: "Does Made in Heaven scale better with Destructive Power or Energy?",
    answer: "Most of its high-damage moves, including the Barrage and Knife Massacre, scale with Destructive Power. Destructive Energy is primarily used for utility moves like Light Speed."
  }
]} />

</Section>
